productDisplayName: Baggit Women Volume Jhuti Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece without a bag. Dimensions: 11 cm x 10 cm Created from tough jute with leather trims A buttoned flap securing the sides of the wallet One main zippered compartment with six card holder slots One long pocket One coin pocket and a zippered pocket on the left fold and a photo id slot on the right fold Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
